Formatting for a single parameter

Source: R/tidy_unmarked.R
um.help.Rd

Formatting for a single parameter

Usage

um.help(X)

um.help

Format

An object of class function of length 1.

Arguments

X

would be one slot from within unmarkedFit@estimates list

Value

a data.frame of the proccess, parameter, SE and approximate Z and P values (assuming normal distribution)

Examples

No
#> Error: object 'No' not found
